subject: chemistry
title: 19M.1.HL.TZ1.28
question_html:
Which product will be obtained at the anode (positive electrode) when molten NaCl is electrolysed?

A. Na (l)

B. Cl (g)

C. Cl2 (g)

D. Na (s)
examiners_html: 57 % of candidates correctly identified products of electrolysis at the anode with the incorrect answers being split by the remaining 43 %
